name: transcript-to-content
description: Paste a URL, get publish-ready content. Scrapes transcripts from YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and X, extracts key insights, and drafts posts in your voice.

interface.shortDescription: Paste a URL, get publish-ready content.
interface.longDescription: Three skills that turn any video or audio URL into content: (1) Transcript Scraper fetches transcripts from YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and X. (2) Insight Extractor pulls key concepts, quotes, and content angles from transcripts. (3) Transcript to Content orchestrates the full pipeline — URL in, drafted post out. Works for YouTube videos, podcasts, TikToks, Instagram content, and meeting recordings. Every podcaster, researcher, and 'learn in public' creator needs this.
defaultPrompt: Turn this video into a LinkedIn post: [URL]
Extract key insights from this video: [URL]
